raw_input.title: Backend Engineer - Python
raw_input.job_html_or_text: Backend Engineer Python for Q-tech/technology company in financial software. Hub de desarrollo in Valladolid. Presencial onsite role. Python backend, cloud migration, devices used by banks and physical cash equipment.

profile.base_cv_text: Backend Python/Django/FastAPI/PostgreSQL engineer based in Malaga, open to remote/hybrid Spain/EU. Regular onsite work outside Malaga should be reviewed.

human_review_notes: Reviewed real case: backend Python fit exists, but presencial/Valladolid should prevent APPLY_NOW for a Malaga-based profile.
